## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`

- [ ] I rebuilt and included `dist/` when application code changed

## Project Principles

- [ ] No real payments or debt mechanics were introduced
- [ ] No fake urgency or misleading scarcity was introduced
- [ ] Existing local save data remains compatible, or migration notes are included
- [ ] Keyboard, mobile and reduced-motion behavior were considered
